homepage.title: Nireos | High Tech solutions in Spectroscopy and Photonics
homepage.description: NIREOS specializes in High Tech solutions in Spectroscopy and Photonics like hyperspectral cameras and spectrometers, used in scientific research and industrial applications.
homepage.text_excerpt:
Nireos | High Tech solutions in Spectroscopy and Photonics
UNDERSTAND THE
INVISIBLE
High Tech Solutions
in Spectroscopy and Photonics
HERA Hyperspectral Cameras
Excellence in imaging, from remote sensing to microscopy
GEMINI Interferometers
High accuracy for Fourier Transform spectroscopy
SPIDER Photodetector
Broadband amplified photodetector, with 24-bit ADC embedded
TRICLOPS Spectrometer
Ultra-broadband Fourier Transform Spectrometer​
UNDERSTAND THE
INVISIBLE
High Tech Solutions
in Spectroscopy and Photonics
HERA Hyperspectral Cameras
Excellence in imaging, from remote sensing to microscopy
GEMINI Interferometers

Main applications
Explore some of the
industrial
and
scientific
applications that can benefit from our
spectroscopy devices
Discover All
Time and frequency resolved fluorescence spectroscopy
Combine spectral and temporal resolution to measure dynamics at all wavelengths and observe how the fluorescence spectrum evolves in time.
Discover more
Hyperspectral imaging in cultural heritage
Hyperspectral imaging cameras non-invasively analyze artifacts and artworks, offering detailed insights on composition, condition, and history.
Discover more
Hyperspectral imaging in food quality control
Hyperspectral imaging cameras enhance food quality analysis by providing accurate information on samples like meat, fish, fruit, and seeds.
Discover more
Hyperspectral imaging for drugs identification
Hyperspectral cameras excel at drugs identification and characterization by detecting chemical variations in the spectral data.
Discover more
Discover All
Our product portfolio
Explore our high tech solutions in Spectroscopy and Photonics.
HERA Hyperspectral Cameras
Easy-to-use and point & shoot cameras, ideal for laboratories and remote sensing.
GEMINI Interferometers
Patented design for FT spectroscopy. Compact design, exceptional light throughput, accuracy and stability.
SPIDER Photodetector
Ultra-broadband spectral coverage, programmable gain, and an embedded 24-bit data acquisition system.
TRICLOPS Spectrometer
Ultra-broadband (400 – 4500 nm) Fourier
Transform
Spectrometer
Events
Explore the upcoming opportunities to connect with the NIREOS team. We regularly participate in key scientific conferences, industry fairs, webinars, and workshops focused on advanced spectroscopy, hyperspectral imaging, and optical sensing.
Discover live demonstrations of our GEMINI, HERA, SPIDER, and TRICLOPS technologies, discuss your specific research needs, and learn how our broadband solutions can accelerate your innovation.
Laserlab-Europe & Lasers4EU Annual & Users Meeting 2026
Discover how NIREOS’ hyperspectral technology is transforming the study and preservation of cultural heritage during Marta’s presentation at Laserlab-Europe 2026.
More info
26/05/2026
29/05/2026
Dolní

high tech solutions in Spectroscopy and Photonics
